raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tu eﬅt arridsan Mauzt-
u dsinuft ar teem Egiptes
Behrneem/ taweem Raimizeem/
nxreem leela Meefa irr / un tu
fti tawu Maukofchanu wairo-
ufi/ manni apkaitinaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Redſt / tad iſſteepu es
tawu Rohku prett tewi/ nn at-
ahwu tawn nospreeftu Teefn/
n nodevun tewi tawu Eenaid-
eeku to Wilisternu Mettu Prah-
tam/ kas tawa negohdiga Zelta
deht kaunejahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tad tu Mauzibu dſin-
ai ar Affura Behrneem/ jo tu ne
warrejt gann dabbuht/ teefcham/
tu te Mauzibu ar teem dſihda-
ma/ ne warreji gan dabbuht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tu eﬅi tawu Mauko-
chanu wairojust eekſch Kaanaana
Senimes lithſ Kaldeju / ir ar to
paſchu tew ne itr gann biſs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kà gurdena irr tawa
Sirde / takka tas Klungs
KUNGS: Kur tu tomehr wiſ-
fas tcchs Leetas darri / prohti
to Darbu weenas leelas Maukas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad tu tawus Kalna-Al-
tarus taiſiji us itkatra Zelta
Preeſchu/ un tawus Augſtums
dartiji ikkatra Eelâ/ un ne bhti ka
zitta Mauka/ kas (masu) Mau-
ko Algu tmahde.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Itt ka weena Lauſibas
Bahrrahpaja Seewa/ kas farva
Wibra Weeta Sweschus pee-
lascb.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiſſahn zittahm Mau-
kahm tohp Alga dohta/ bet tu
dohd tawu Algu wiſſeem ta-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "weem Drauguſeeht/ un apdah-
wana tohs/ ka teem buhs wiſſ-
apkahrt pee tevim nahkt/ ar te-
wim Mauzibu dſiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tà noteek pee tevim zit-
tadi tawas Mauzibas/ ka pee zit-
tahm Seewahn/ tadeht ka ne-
weens tew pakkatdsennahs
Mauzibu dſiht / bet tu peedohd
Naudu/ un tew ne tohp Nauda
dohta/ fatwada eﬅi tu tappuft.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht tu Mauka/ klaupi
ta KUNGA Wahrdn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tà fakka tas Klungs
KUNGS: Tapehz ka tu tawu
Naudu papillam peedohd / un
taws Raunums zaur tawu Mau-
kofchanu ar taweem Draugu-
teim/ un ar wiſſeem Suhdu-
Deeweem tawas Negantivas at-
ſegts tohp/ un tn isleij to Affini
tawu Behrnu/ fo tu teem no-
dohd.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht rangi / es fapul-
zinaschu tawus Draugutus / ar
fo tu eﬅi jaukutees/ un wiſſus/
to tu eﬅi mihtinaaji/ ar wiſſeem/
fo tu eﬅi eenihdejsi/ un es fapul-
zinaschu tohs wiſsapkahrt prett
tewi/ un atteg+chu preekſch wiſ-
xeein tawn Raununn/ ka teem
buhs wiſſu tawn Plitkumu re-
dseht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es sohdischu terwi pehz
tahs Teefas to Lauſibas Bahrr-
ahpaju / un Affins Islehjeju/
un * darrischu tew affinahtu ar
Bahrsibas un Lauſibas Dutmo-
schanas.
* Eebr. Wall: Es darritchu tew pir Affnim.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
